channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump steps back from Hormuz fee plan in favour of Gulf investment deals
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Trump Drops Plan To Charge Hormuz Transit Fee, Shifts Focus To Gulf Investment
- Trump nixes 20 percent Strait of Hormuz toll proposal
- Trump pivots from 20 percent Strait of Hormuz fee amid Iran war escalation
- US President Trump drops 20% Strait of Hormuz fee plan
- Trump says US to abandon proposed Strait of Hormuz cargo fee
- Trump Backtracks On Plan To Toll Hormuz Ships
- Trump scraps Hormuz toll plan but presses ahead with Iran blockade
- Trump drops Strait of Hormuz fee plan as renewed attacks threaten interim peace deal
- Trump backtracks on plan to toll Hormuz ships
- Trump steps back from proposal for Hormuz fees in favour of Gulf investment deals
- Trump Swaps Hormuz Toll Plan for Gulf Trade Deals
- Trump Backs Off 20% Strait of Hormuz Fee
- Trump: US investment deals with Gulf states to replace Hormuz fee
- Trump withdraws planned 20% levy on Hormuz ships, calls for trade deals with Gulf countries instead
- Trump says US to abandon proposed Strait of Hormuz cargo fee
- Trump retreats from Hormuz 20% fee plan in pivot to Gulf investment deals
- US-Iran war: Trump drops 20% toll plan on Hormuz, seeks Gulf investment deals instead
- Trump drops plan for 20% fee for transit through Hormuz Strait
- Trump Says He Will Replace 20% Hormuz Cargo Fee With Investment Deals With Gulf States
- Trump drops 20% fee plan for Strait of Hormuz in favour of deals with Gulf states
- Trump’s Plan to Charge a Toll in the Strait of Hormuz: What to Know
- Trump’s Plan to Charge a Toll in the Strait of Hormuz: What to Know]]>

- In Bangkok Bar Blaze, Signs of Fatal Lapses Repeated Across the World
- Flowers and forensic teams at Bangkok bar where deadly fire killed at least 27
- Death toll in Bangkok bar fire reaches 30
- Bangkok bar fire death toll rises to 30 as police probe possible negligence

- How flammable decor and lax rules turned Bangkok pub into a death trap
